title: LOLStar Christmas Window Lights, 3 Pack Multicoloured Stocking, Snowman, Santa Hat with Suction Cup, Timer Function and Slow Fade Mode Battery Operated Lights for Christmas Decoration New Year Eve
features: Eye-catching Christmas decorations: Our multicolored Christmas stocking, snowman, and Christmas hat window lights are thoughtfully designed to capture the essence of Christmas. With a generous 7-inch diameter, they are visible from both inside and out. The 17.5 inch cords create a magical display that enchants neighbors and passersby. With these iconic shapes, your home will radiate the warmth and joy of the holiday season

Efficient timer function and smooth transition: After switching on, our lights automatically activate the timer function, providing 6 hours of continuous illumination, followed by 18 hours of darkness each day. This energy-efficient setting ensures your Christmas decorations remain illuminated during the busiest hours. Immerse yourself in the festive atmosphere with our smooth transition feature, which adds an extra touch to your Christmas spirit

Convenient battery operation: Our Christmas LED window hanging lights are powered by 3 AAA batteries (NOT INCLUDED). With low energy consumption, they are safe and reliable to use, providing a worry-free and convenient lighting solution for your Christmas decorations

Easy to use: Our Halloween window lights are designed for ease of use and versatility. With the included suction cups and hooks, they can be easily attached to various surfaces such as glass, doors, and more. A little water on the suction cup increases its adhesive strength, ensuring more reliable attachment of the Christmas window lights. We also offer self-adhesive hooks for even more convenience and adaptability in different situations

Versatile for various interiors: Our Christmas window lights are versatile and can be used in a variety of interiors. Whether in your bedroom, on windows, walls, doors, balconies, patios, porches, or closets, these lights add a festive touch to any room
description: Product Description CHRISTMAS WINDOW LIGHTS EFFICIENT TIMING FUNCTION Once turned on, our lights automatically activate the timer function, providing 8 hours of illumination followed by 16 hours of darkness each day. This energy-efficient setting ensures your Christmas decorations stay illuminated during the most active hours and conserves power when not needed. SLOW FADE FOR EERIE AMBIANCE Immerse yourself in the festive atmosphere with the slow fade function. Create a warm and welcoming atmosphere in your home with these charming decorations, and make your Christmas window display truly special.
